title: Letter CXXIV.

source.title: NPNF2-07. Cyril of Jerusalem, Gregory Nazianzen

verses.text: (A little later on, when the weather was more settled, Gregory accepts the invitation and proposes to come at once, but declines to attend the Provincial Synod.)
And I hasten, and that for a private visit.
Synods and Conventions I salute from afar, since I have experienced that most of them (to speak moderately) are but sorry affairs.
Help with your prayers my just desires that I may obtain that for which I am anxious.
